Explanation: The search results indicate that Dr. Mohammed (Jalal) Ahamed is a Fulbright Canada Research Chair, director of the MicroNano Mechatronics Laboratory, and his research focuses on wearable inertial sensor-based control systems for treatment and rehabilitation strategies in Parkinson's disease—a disease known to cause speech impairment. He was a Fulbright scholar, and is a member of ASME and IEEE, matching the science association membership in 2022. All clues align with Dr. Mohammed Ahamed as the thesis director in question [70586].
Exact Answer: Dr. Mohammed (Jalal) Ahamed
Confidence: 100%
